merged.Description: The recalled Konwin branded desktop heaters have model number BHN2133. The heater has a white plastic frame with a black fan and black grill covers. The heater measures about 12 inches high and about 10 inches wide. "Konwin" and the model number are printed on a label on the bottom of the heater.
merged.Title: Meijer Recalls Konwin Desktop Heaters Due to Fire and Burn Hazards
merged.ConsumerContact: Meijer at 800-927-8699, via contact form at Web Form, or online at https://help.meijer.com/csp?id=m_kb_recall or https://www.meijer.com/ and click on "Product Recalls" at the bottom of the page for more information.

Injuries.Name: The firm received eight reports of fans burning and melting. No injuries have been reported.

Retailers.Name: Meijer stores in Michigan, Ohio, Indiana, Illinois, Wisconsin and Kentucky from September 2024 through January 2025 for between $25 and $40.

Importers.Name: Meijer Distribution Inc., of Grand Rapids, Michigan

Hazards.Name: The heater's fan can fail to turn on and cause the unit to overheat and ignite, posing fire and burn hazards.

Remedies.Name: Consumers should immediately stop using the recalled desktop heaters and return them to any Meijer store for a full refund through the original form of payment.

The heater measures about 12 inches high and about 10 inches wide. “Konwin” and the model number are printed on a label on the bottom of the heater.
